channel.title: PennyWise Beginner
channel.description: Personal finance, made simple — for total beginners.

item.title: What is Compound Interest? A Beginner's Guide
item.description: Learn how compound interest works and why it is a powerful tool for building long-term wealth. Discover how your money can grow faster over time.

item.title: Start Budgeting with the 50/30/20 Rule
item.description: Learn how to create a realistic budget with the 50/30/20 rule. Allocate income to needs, wants, and savings using clear steps and examples for beginners.

item.title: Best Savings Accounts for Beginners: A Simple Guide
item.description: Learn how to choose the right savings account to grow your money. We explain high-yield savings accounts, traditional options, and how to start today.
